description: Create AlphaFold pLDDT profile with functional residue annotations and domain architecture
code:
import requests
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

# Re-fetch pLDDT data
af_url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-Q9VSA3-F1-model_v6.pdb"
pdb_resp = requests.get(af_url)
pdb_text = pdb_resp.text

plddt_scores = {}
for line in pdb_text.split('\n'):
    if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
        res_num = int(line[22:26].strip())
        bfactor = float(line[60:66].strip())
        plddt_scores[res_num] = bfactor

positions = sorted(plddt_scores.keys())
scores = [plddt_scores[p] for p in positions]

# Key functional residues (Drosophila numbering)
catalytic = {397: "Glu397\n(catalytic)"}
fad_binding = {274: "D274", 277: "R277", 302: "R302", 303: "K303", 304: "T304", 312: "H312", 313: "Q313"}
substrate_binding = {163: "S163", 187: "W187", 188: "I188", 189: "T189", 370: "Q370", 371: "I371", 372: "F372"}
pink1_site = {347: "S347\n(PINK1)"}

fig, (ax1, ax2) = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(16, 10), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [3, 1]})

# Panel 1: pLDDT profile with functional residue annotations
colors = []
for s in scores:
    if s >= 90:
        colors.append('#0053D6')  # Very high - blue
    elif s >= 70:
        colors.append('#65CBF3')  # Confident - light blue
    elif s >= 50:
        colors.append('#FFDB13')  # Low - yellow
    else:
        colors.append('#FF7D45')  # Very low - orange

ax1.bar(positions, scores, color=colors, width=1.0, linewidth=0)
ax1.set_xlim(0, 420)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 105)
ax1.set_ylabel('pLDDT Score', fontsize=12)
ax1.set_title('AlphaFold pLDDT Confidence Profile — Drosophila Mcad (Q9VSA3)\nAF-Q9VSA3-F1-model_v6', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

# Add confidence bands
ax1.axhspan(90, 105, alpha=0.05, color='blue')
ax1.axhspan(70, 90, alpha=0.05, color='cyan')
ax1.axhspan(50, 70, alpha=0.05, color='yellow')
ax1.axhspan(0, 50, alpha=0.05, color='orange')
ax1.axhline(y=90, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.4)
ax1.axhline(y=70, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.4)

# Mark transit peptide
ax1.axvspan(1, 22, alpha=0.15, color='red', label='Transit peptide (1-22)')

# Annotate key residues
for pos in catalytic:
    ax1.annotate(catalytic[pos], xy=(pos, plddt_scores[pos]), 
                xytext=(pos-25, 75), fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='red',
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=1.5))

for pos in pink1_site:
    ax1.annotate(pink1_site[pos], xy=(pos, plddt_scores[pos]),
                xytext=(pos+15, 78), fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='purple',
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='purple', lw=1.5))

# Mark functional residue positions with vertical lines
for pos in fad_binding:
    ax1.axvline(x=pos, color='green', alpha=0.3, linewidth=1)
for pos in substrate_binding:
    ax1.axvline(x=pos, color='orange', alpha=0.3, linewidth=1)
for pos in catalytic:
    ax1.axvline(x=pos, color='red', alpha=0.5, linewidth=2)
for pos in pink1_site:
    ax1.axvline(x=pos, color='purple', alpha=0.4, linewidth=1.5)

legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#0053D6', label='Very high (≥90)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#65CBF3', label='Confident (70-90)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FFDB13', label='Low (50-70)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FF7D45', label='Very low (<50)'),
    plt.Line2D([0], [0], color='red', linewidth=2, label='Catalytic Glu397'),
    plt.Line2D([0], [0], color='green', linewidth=1, label='FAD binding'),
    plt.Line2D([0], [0], color='orange', linewidth=1, label='Substrate binding'),
    plt.Line2D([0], [0], color='purple', linewidth=1.5, label='PINK1 pSer347'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='red', alpha=0.15, label='Transit peptide'),
]
ax1.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower left', fontsize=8, ncol=3)

# Panel 2: Domain architecture
ax2.set_xlim(0, 420)
ax2.set_ylim(0, 4)
ax2.set_xlabel('Residue Position', fontsize=12)
ax2.set_title('Domain Architecture', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

# Transit peptide
ax2.barh(3, 22, left=0, height=0.6, color='red', alpha=0.5, edgecolor='black')
ax2.text(11, 3, 'TP', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')

# Acyl-CoA_dh_N (Pfam PF02771) - approximate
ax2.barh(2, 100, left=23, height=0.6, color='#3498db', edgecolor='black')
ax2.text(73, 2, 'Acyl-CoA_dh_N\n(PF02771)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold', color='white')

# Acyl-CoA_dh_M (Pfam PF02770) - approximate  
ax2.barh(2, 120, left=130, height=0.6, color='#2ecc71', edgecolor='black')
ax2.text(190, 2, 'Acyl-CoA_dh_M\n(PF02770)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold', color='white')

# Acyl-CoA_dh_1 (Pfam PF00441) - approximate
ax2.barh(2, 150, left=260, height=0.6, color='#e67e22', edgecolor='black')
ax2.text(335, 2, 'Acyl-CoA_dh_1 (C-term)\n(PF00441)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold', color='white')

# CDD MCAD
ax2.barh(1, 397, left=23, height=0.6, color='#9b59b6', alpha=0.5, edgecolor='black')
ax2.text(221, 1, 'CDD: cd01157 (MCAD)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='white')

ax2.set_yticks([1, 2, 3])
ax2.set_yticklabels(['CDD', 'Pfam', 'Signal'], fontsize=9)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('structural_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Structural analysis figure saved.")
